category_sources: Official homepage https://freesasa.github.io/ describes FreeSASA as a CLI tool, C library, and Python module for calculating SASA.
source_facts.description says Solvent Accessible Surface Area calculations.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and documentation use FreeSASA.
docs_sources: Official homepage links to reference documentation for the CLI, C API, and Python module.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mittinatten/freesasa, so repo is not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes SASA calculation, command-line tool, C library, and Python module.
